classObjective: Identify and draw lines of symmetry for two-dimensional figures.
workedExamples: 13-6, Example 1 — Identify and Draw Lines of Symmetry
warmUp: How many lines of symmetry does a regular hexagon have?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: vertical, horizontal, diagonal lines of symmetry; counting lines of symmetry; identifying symmetry in various figures
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice identifying and drawing lines of symmetry in figures
independentPractice: Practice problems identifying all lines of symmetry in regular polygons and other figures
assessment: Exit ticket: identify all lines of symmetry in a rectangle and an isosceles triangle
capReflection: How does the number of lines of symmetry relate to the regularity of a polygon?
